purpose: Prevent decorative frontend controls from entering the product without a real route, API, contract or test-backed behavior.

copy_audit_rule.status: design finalized 2026-07-08 (R3); fact source docs/product/frontend-product-design.md section 14; enforcement lands with the copy fixes as test_blueprint_user_copy_bans_implementation_terms in backend/tests/test_blueprint_page_audit.py (assertion design in page-specs section 10.4)
copy_audit_rule.rule: User-visible copy (page body text, empty states, hints, buttons, options, title/placeholder/aria-label attributes, and backend Chinese messages surfaced verbatim in the UI) must not contain implementation terms: internal field names, raw enum values, scorer/generator version codes, construction-phase numbering, or internal view code names.
copy_audit_rule.scanned_scope: visible text and title/placeholder/aria-label attributes inside the <template> section of .vue files; plus backend user-facing Chinese detail/preflight messages rendered in the UI

exemptions.reason: machine-identifier input example for admins configuring report format codes; codes are the value, not copy

exemptions.marker: sql header comment lines ("-- 导出规则: ...")
exemptions.reason: company_sql_v1 export artifact is contract-locked (0505 baseline); SQL file comments are not UI copy and must not be changed for copy rules

known_violations: frontend/src/pages/DailyReportsPage.vue:1037 SQL 预览回填 page description
frontend/src/pages/WeeklyReportsPage.vue:626 采信状态为 2 / 本阶段 helper line
frontend/src/pages/WeeklyReportsPage.vue:673 SQL 预览回填 empty state
backend/app/exports/company_sql.py:345 rule_v1/fallback preflight message surfaced on /exports (error code rule_fallback_blocked and gate logic stay unchanged; only the message text is rewritten)
copy_audit_rule.known_violations_policy: known_violations is a shrink-only baseline: the audit test may tolerate exactly these entries until each is replaced per docs/product/frontend-product-design.md section 14.2; new violations must never be added, and once the list is empty the test tightens to a full ban.

modal_rule.status: enforced (2026-07, WP3-E); fact source docs/product/frontend-product-design.md section 10; scanner active in scripts/validate_frontend_controls.py (validate_modal_rule)
allowed_overlay_forms: centered_modal: .modal-backdrop (fixed inset-0 grid place-items:center) + dialog container with role="dialog" aria-modal="true" aria-labelledby; formalizes the existing report-modal-backdrop/report-detail-modal base

context_panel: right-side config-panel, only when all three conditions hold - edits the currently selected list item, the list must stay visible for comparison, and the action is repeatable configuration editing (not creation, not an irreversible decision)
behavior: Esc close, backdrop-click close and an explicit close button must all work; dirty forms require a sm confirm before discarding input.
Focus moves into the dialog on open, is trapped inside, and returns to the trigger on close; body scroll is locked.
Viewports <=640px render every tier fullscreen with a title bar close button.
At most one sm confirm dialog may stack on a business modal; no business modal opens another business modal.
migration_targets: AppShell workspace-create wizard -> centered modal md (done 2026-07, WP3-E)
WorkspaceDiscovery drawer -> centered modal md (adds discover?q= search and join-by-code block; done 2026-07, WP3-G)
SourcesPage create-source panel -> centered modal md (done 2026-07, WP3-E)
SourcesPage import-preview panel -> centered modal sm (done 2026-07, WP3-E)
modal_rule.scanner_rule_once_enforced: config-panel class may only appear in context_panel_whitelist files (with the context-panel marker); every element with class modal-backdrop must contain role="dialog" and aria-modal="true" in the same component.
modal_rule.context_panel_marker: whitelisted config-panel elements must also carry the context-panel class as the formalization marker

button_action_rule.rule: Every <button> in page and shell Vue files must either invoke an action or submit a form. Pure decorative buttons are forbidden.

router_link_rule.rule: Every <RouterLink> in page and shell Vue files must point to a route. If an entry needs custom behavior, use a button with an explicit handler instead.

required_markers: uses the top-right user pill as a real account entry
